nasb.text: and they have testified to your love before the church. You will do well to send them on their way in a manner worthy of God.

esv.text: who testified to your love before the church. You will do well to send them on their journey in a manner worthy of God.

cnv.text: 他們在教會面前證實了你的愛；你照著　神所喜悅的，資助他們的旅程，這樣是好的。

ccb.text: 他们把你的爱心告诉了教会。愿你照着上帝所喜悦的方式继续帮助他们，

csbs.text: 他们在教会面前见证了你的爱。你如果以神喜悦的方式送他们上路，就做得很好了，
